summary: Fixed B04 credit note generation flow. Root cause: frontend used hardcoded reason IDs (cn-error-ncf) that didn't exist in database. Backend expected actual UUIDs from return_reasons collection. Fix: Modified CreditNoteModal.js to fetch reasons from /api/credit-notes/return-reasons API. Full B04 flow now works: Search→Confirm→Reason→Generate→Success (B0400000002 created for transaction 166).

bug_fix_details.root_cause: CreditNoteModal.js used hardcoded CREDIT_NOTE_REASONS array with fake IDs like 'cn-error-ncf'. Backend credit_notes.py validates reason_id against return_reasons collection in MongoDB. IDs didn't match causing 'Motivo de devolución no válido' error.
bug_fix_details.fix_applied: Removed hardcoded CREDIT_NOTE_REASONS constant. Added useEffect to fetch return reasons from /api/credit-notes/return-reasons API when modal opens. Updated reason list to use fetched data with actual database UUIDs.

test_flow_executed.step5_enter_pin: PASS - Admin PIN entered via keyboard input
test_flow_executed.step8_select_reason: PASS - 'Error de Facturación' selected from API-fetched list
test_flow_executed.step9_click_generar: PASS - Credit note B0400000002 created successfully
test_flow_executed.final_state: SUCCESS - Modal shows 'Nota de Crédito Generada' with B0400000002

critical_code_review_comments: The hardcoded CREDIT_NOTE_REASONS was a design flaw - should have always used API data
Consider adding error handling if return_reasons API fails to load
context_for_next_testing_agent: B04 credit note flow fully functional. Tested with transaction 166, created B0400000002. PinPad works correctly with keyboard input. Return reasons are now fetched from API.

rca_of_the_issue.problem: B04 'Generar B04' button did nothing after entering PIN and transaction number
rca_of_the_issue.investigation: 1) Backend APIs verified working via curl 2) Console showed 400 error 3) Response was 'Motivo de devolución no válido' 4) Traced to reason_id mismatch
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Frontend sent hardcoded reason_id 'cn-error-ncf' but database had UUIDs like 'c3e6a443-f432-4ae6-b8d8-f13f31d8d8bb'
rca_of_the_issue.fix: Fetch return_reasons from API on modal open, use actual database IDs
rca_of_the_issue.prevention: Use API-driven data instead of hardcoded values for database lookups
